parents.subject: LU-19693 efalnd: Use separate hash key in conn instead of remote NID

commit.subject: LU-19693 efalnd: Fix object pools double destroy on create fail
commit.message:
LU-19693 efalnd: Fix object pools double destroy on create fail

If we fail creating an object  pool on device init, we call the destroy
pool handler to cleanup any allocated object that succeeded prior to the
failure. After cleanup completed we call dev destroy which again calls
the destroy pool handler which tries to use already freed memory. Fix
this by setting the object array to NULL.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Change-Id: I858339d579e09918aab19fc0d662730a28ac24b8
Signed-off-by: Yonatan Nachum <ynachum@amazon.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/63003
Reviewed-by: Timothy Day <timday@amazon.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
